channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: US skier Lauren Macuga wins downhill portion of new team combined event at world championships
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — American skier Lauren Macuga posted the fastest time in the downhill portion of the new team combined event at the Alpine skiing world championships on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aaliyah Edwards shocks Breanna Stewart 12-0 in opening round of Unrivaled 1-on-1 tournament
item.description: Aaliyah Edwards pulled off the stunner of the opening round of the Unrivaled 1-on-1 tournament beating top-seeded Breanna Stewart 12-0. The tournament that will be played over three days featured 23 of the league's 36 players. A few had other commitments and a couple others were out with injuries.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LaMelo Ball misses second half of Hornets' game against Brooklyn with right ankle soreness
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — LaMelo Ball missed the second half of Charlotte's 97-89 loss to the Brooklyn Nets on Monday night because of right ankle soreness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sidney Crosby says he's good to go for Canada at 4 Nations after missing Penguins games with injury
item.description: BROSSARD, Quebec (AP) — After missing Pittsburgh's final two games before the NHL break for the 4 Nations Face-Off, Sidney Crosby took part in Canada's first practice Monday and declared himself good to go.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senator opens inquiry into US Center for SafeSport’s hiring of investigator charged with sex crimes
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee is looking into how a former police officer landed an investigator's job at the U.S.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Track's proposed eligibility, transgender rules would completely ban Semenya and others
item.description: Track and field moved toward adopting rules that would place athletes assigned female at birth but have higher testosterone levels, like Caster Semenya, under the same set of rules as transgender athletes who were born male and transitioned to female.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Reds will wear No. 14 patch on jersey sleeve to honor Pete Rose, who died last year
item.description: CINCINNATI (AP) — Pete Rose may be on baseball’s permanently ineligible list, but the late hit king’s No. 14 will be on Cincinnati Reds’ uniforms this year. Cincinnati posted a photo of the patch on X on Monday with the message “14 on our side all season” and a heart emoji.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl returning to the Bay Area for 2026
item.description: (KRON) -- The Super Bowl is coming back to the Bay Area next year. A decade ago, the region hosted Super Bowl 50. Next year, it will play host to Super Bowl LX. On Monday morning, San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan was in New Orleans for the official Super Bowl handoff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Jalen Hurts' rocky road leads to a Super Bowl MVP award
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Jalen Hurts smiled as he held the Lombardi Trophy in his right hand and the Super Bowl MVP trophy in his left hand, reflecting on all he has gone through to reach the pinnacle of success.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Serena Williams comes to Taylor Swift's defense as Super Bowl LIX crowd boos pop star
item.description: Tennis legend Serena Williams came to the defense of Taylor Swift as the Super Bowl LIX crowd booed the pop star during the game between the Philadelphia Eagles and Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 6 hidden messages in Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl performance
item.description: Kendrick Lamar’s Super Bowl halftime performance is growing in viewership hours after the big game, gaining more than 11 million views since it aired Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Member of Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show won't face charges for flag protest
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The cast member who displayed the Palestinian flag with the word “GAZA” in protest during Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show will not face charges, New Orleans police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Nike, NFL women's sports Super Bowl commercials draw backlash amid national trans athlete controversies
item.description: Two Super Bowl ads were the subject of online criticism by advocates for protecting female athletes from trans inclusion amid a national movement on the issue.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley sets the NFL's season rushing record, including the playoffs
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Saquon Barkley set an NFL single-season rushing record in the Super Bowl, held his young daughter as a torrent of confetti fluttered around them and flashed a smile as he held a Philadelphia newspaper with “CHAMPS!” stamped above his photo.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chaos fills Philadelphia as Eagles fans celebrate rout of Chiefs in Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles fans took the streets to celebrate their dominant Super Bowl LIX victory, and it quickly turned into chaos on Broad Street.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah HC earns first shootout victory over Capitals
item.description: WASHINGTON D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is carrying a ton of momentum into the Four Nations Break. Karel Vejmelka made 30 saves in relief, and the Utah Hockey Club recovered for a 5-4 shootout win against the Washington Capitals at Capital One Arena on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: A presidential first: Trump at the Super Bowl, latest chapter in a complicated legacy with football
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — As a student, Donald Trump played high school football. As a business baron, he owned a team in an upstart rival to the NFL and then sued the established league. As president, he denigrated pros who took a knee during the national anthem as part of a social justice movement.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Eagles Cooper DeJean scores pick-six on birthday
item.description: Eagles defensive back Cooper DeJean made an already memorable 22nd birthday even bigger during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, WFLA, NBC

item.title: PHOTOS: Celebrities spotted at the Super Bowl
item.description: The players on the field Sunday at Super Bowl LIX are celebrities in their own right, but they're far from the only big names gathered in New Orleans for the Chiefs-Eagles matchup.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: What's at stake, who's announcing, who's performing and what time does it start? Everything to know
item.description: Sean Lewis and Jewell Hillery talked with Rod Carter, live from New Orleans for The Big Game, on Sunday's WGN Weekend Morning News. See the attached video player to watch. Super Bowl Sunday weekend has arrived.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Curry scores 34 points, Butler adds 25 in Golden State debut as Warriors rally to beat Bulls 132-111
item.description: Stephen Curry scored 34 points and tied a season high with eight 3-pointers, Jimmy Butler added 25 points in his Golden State debut and the Warriors rallied to beat the Chicago Bulls 132-111 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Radek Faksa scores in the 10th round of the shootout to give Blues a 6-5 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Radek Faksa scored in the 10th round of the shootout to give the St. Louis Blues a 6-5 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: He's back, baby! ESPN's Dick Vitale makes return to commentating following 4th bout with cancer
item.description: ESPN’s Dick Vitale received a standing ovation Saturday night at Clemson’s Littlejohn Coliseum in his first game back as a commentator since recovering from his fourth bout with cancer.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes offense struggles again in loss to West Virginia
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah basketball team shot just 41 percent from the field and lost its third straight road game at West Virginia Saturday, 72-61.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Padres sign outfielder/first baseman Connor Joe for 2025 season
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made a move to bolster their roster for the upcoming season by signing outfielder and first baseman Connor Joe to a one-year contract, President of Baseball Operations and General Manager A.J. Preller announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: The most expensive merch we found at the Super Bowl
item.description: We all know attending the Super Bowl is super pricey endeavor, but be prepared to shell out some serious cash if you're looking for fancy merch.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, NewsNation

item.title: Clippers to sign former top pick Ben Simmons: report
item.description: A former No. 1 overall pick in the NBA Draft has found a new home in Los Angeles. The L.A. Clippers are expected to sign three-time All Star Ben Simmons as a free agent when he clears waivers, according to ESPN's Shams Charania.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Here's how to watch the Super Bowl for free
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles will face off in Super Bowl LIX, two years after their matchup in Super Bowl LVII, which the Chiefs won 38-35.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, NewsNation

item.title: McCallum wins all-around as Red Rocks beat Arizona
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Grace McCallum won the all-around with a score of 39.65 to lead the 4th-ranked Utah gymnastics team past #19 Arizona, 197.675 to 196.125.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Martinez scores 30 as USU beats Fresno State, 89-81
item.description: FRESNO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Ian Martinez scored 30 points and led Utah State to an 89-81 victory over Fresno State Friday night. Martinez, who made 10 of 14 shots from the field, tied a career high with eight rebounds for the Aggies (21-3, 11-2 Mountain West Conference).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: House Divided: Wife an Eagles fan, husband cheers for Chiefs in NOLA
item.description: When one of the couple grows up in Kansas a Chiefs fan, and the other in South Jersey an Eagles fan, one would expect the marriage to be tested but Jaime and Dave Dailey make it fun.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, Fox 5

item.title: NFL has no plans to end DEI practices, commissioner says
item.description: The NFL is committed to sticking to its DEI policies despite a change in its Super Bowl on-field messaging campaign
item.dc:creator: Libbey Dean, NewsNation

item.title: Sports reporter dies while in New Orleans for Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Adan Manzano died on Wednesday in New Orleans while on assignment to cover the Super Bowl for both Telemundo Kansas City and Tico Sports.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: NCAA changes transgender policy to limit women's competition to athletes assigned female at birth
item.description: The NCAA changed its participation policy for transgender athletes on Thursday, limiting competition in women's sports to athletes assigned female at birth only.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz come back to beat Warriors, 131-128
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Jordan Clarkson scored 31 points and Keyonte George added 26 to lead the Utah Jazz to a 131-128 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Wednesday night. Isaiah Collier added 20 points and 11 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Settlement creates $5 million fund for NWSL players after abuse scandal
item.description: The National Women's Soccer League will establish a $5 million fund for players as part of a settlement that stemmed from allegations of emotional and sexual misconduct that rocked the league in 2021. Attorneys general from Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, WGN 9
